ddls:
CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Name of the degree or certification (e.g., 10th, 12th, Rscit, ITI, CSE Diploma) */,
  "board" TEXT /* Board or institution from which the qualification was received */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of completion or applicable period (e.g., 2016-17, July 2019) */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of marks or grades achieved */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual who holds the qualification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the qualification (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Unique certificate number issued by the board or institution */,
  "institution_address" TEXT /* Address of the institution from which the qualification was received */,
  "major_subjects" TEXT /* Major subjects or areas of focus in the qualification */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the qualification was officially awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_degree FOREIGN KEY ("degree") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_board FOREIGN KEY ("board") REFERENCES boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the individual (e.g., student, faculty) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the profile picture of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree (e.g., 10th, 12th, Rscit, ITI, CSE Diploma) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree */,
  "level" TEXT /* Educational level (e.g., secondary, higher secondary, diploma) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the degree program (e.g., 1 year, 2 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the board or institution (e.g., Rajasthan, NCVT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the board */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the board or institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the board or institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year or period of completion (e.g., 2016-17, July 2019) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year or period */,
  "academic_session" TEXT /* Academic session (e.g., Spring 2023, Fall 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for pending qualifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, educator, student) */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the qualification being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the qualification */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the qualification was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_qualification_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualification_id") REFERENCES qualifications ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the qualification that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_qualification_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualification_id") REFERENCES qualifications ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, educator, student) */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view qualifications */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit qualifications */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete qualifications */,
  "can_add" INTEGER /* Permission to add new qualifications */,
  "can_view_audit_logs" INTEGER /* Permission to view audit logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
